query:
WITH requested_asset(id, sort_order) AS (
              SELECT CAST(value AS TEXT), key
              FROM json_each(?1)
            )
            SELECT a.id,
                   a.hash,
                   a.file_name,
                   a.file_size,
                   a.mime_type,
                   a.width,
                   a.height,
                   a.modified_at,
                   a.created_at,
                   a.updated_at
            FROM requested_asset requested
            INNER JOIN asset a ON a.id = requested.id
            ORDER BY requested.sort_order ASC
